narrative:
Twinsburg 3-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,008 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.2%, a clear Democratic lean of 11.4 percentage points.
